ns0:entry.ns0:title: WangRongsheng/awesome-LLM-resources
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WangRongsheng/awesome-LLM-resources
Language: unknown
🧑‍🚀 全世界最好的LLM资料总结（多模态生成、Agent、辅助编程、AI审稿、数据处理、模型训练、模型推理、o1 模型、MCP、小语言模型、视觉语言模型） | Summary of the world's best LLM resources.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: afshinea/stanford-cs-229-machine-learning
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/afshinea/stanford-cs-229-machine-learning
Language: unknown
VIP cheatsheets for Stanford's CS 229 Machine Learning

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ashishpatel26/500-AI-Agents-Projects
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ashishpatel26/500-AI-Agents-Projects
Language: unknown
The 500 AI Agents Projects is a curated collection of AI agent use cases across various industries. It showcases practical applications and provides links to open-source projects for implementation, illustrating how AI agents are transforming sectors such as healthcare, finance, education, retail, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ashishpatel26/500-AI-Machine-learning-Deep-learning-Computer-vision-NLP-Projects-with-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ashishpatel26/500-AI-Machine-learning-Deep-learning-Computer-vision-NLP-Projects-with-code
Language: unknown
500 AI Machine learning Deep learning Computer vision NLP Projects with code

ns0:entry.ns0:title: farhanashrafdev/90DaysOfCyberSecurity
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/farhanashrafdev/90DaysOfCyberSecurity
Language: unknown
This repository contains a 90-day cybersecurity study plan, along with resources and materials for learning various cybersecurity concepts and technologies. The plan is organized into daily tasks, covering topics such as Network+, Security+, Linux, Python, Traffic Analysis, Git, ELK, AWS, Azure, and Hacking. The repository also includes a `LEARN.md

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jwasham/coding-interview-university
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jwasham/coding-interview-university
Language: unknown
A complete computer science study plan to become a software engineer.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kepano/obsidian-skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kepano/obsidian-skills
Language: unknown
Agent skills for Obsidian. Teach your agent to use Markdown, Bases, JSON Canvas, and use the CLI.
